title: The Ice Cream Mod
description: This mod adds 4 ice cream flavors and 2 toppings to Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds some cool ice cream things to Minecraft!
I strongly recommend using JEI for the recipes.

**Ice Cream and Toppings:**
There are 4 different kinds of ice cream: vanilla, chocolate, strawberry, and cookies & cream.
There are 2 toppings: chocolate syrup and sprinkles. Chocolate syrup gives you haste 5 for 3 minutes, and sprinkles give you speed 4.

**Ice cream recipes:**
Craft 1 cone, 1 sugar, 1 milk bucket, 1 crushed ice (crafted with 1 ice), and 1 flavor (vanilla extract, cocoa beans, strawberry, or cookies & cream). If you want toppings, craft the ice cream with the topping. You can not put 2 or more toppings on 1 ice cream.

Cone: Craft 3 wheat in 1.0.1 or 7 wheat in 1.0.0 to get an ice cream cone.

Freezer: Craft 7 iron and 1 ice to make a freezer. Put a water bucket into the first slot of the freezer, press the button, and it freezes into ice. Beware that the bucket is lost in the process, so make sure to have a good source of iron.

How to get vanilla extract: Get vanilla flowers that spawn naturally and craft them into vanilla extract.

How to get strawberries: Trade with a novice farmer.

How to get cookies and cream: Craft 1 milk and 1 sugar to make 1 cream, craft 2 cookies and 1 cream in a sandwich to get cookies and cream.

How to get toppings: For the chocolate syrup, craft 1 honey bottle, 4 cocoa beans, and 4 sugar. Craft 1 sugar into 1 sprinkles.

 That's all that I'm going to say, because I want you to explore this mod for yourself.

**1.0.1 Update:**
This update makes this mod compatible with my other mod, Simple Foods, by changing the cone recipe to only require 3 wheat.
